name: Pyramid Stamp Hoodie
description: White premium hoodie featuring vintage Egyptian pyramid postage stamp design on the back. A tribute to the timeless wonders of Giza.

name: Arabic Egypt Hoodie
description: White hoodie with beautiful Arabic calligraphy "مصر" (Egypt) on the back and Horus eagle emblem on the chest. East meets West in perfect harmony.

name: Pharaoh Legacy Hoodie
description: Black hoodie with stunning pharaoh collage featuring Nefertiti, Tutankhamun, and ancient Egyptian iconography. The centerpiece of the 1ST collection.

name: Eye of Horus Hoodie
description: Black hoodie featuring the mystical Eye of Horus, obelisk, and Sphinx silhouette against a golden sun. Ancient symbolism meets modern streetwear.

name: Egypt Stripes Hoodie
description: Clean white hoodie with bold "EGYPT" typography and pyramid stripe design. Minimalist approach to Egyptian heritage.

name: Pyramids Vintage Hoodie
description: Black hoodie with vintage "PYRAMIDS" sunburst graphic and Cleopatra chest emblem. Retro aesthetics meet Egyptian heritage.

name: Ankh Sphinx Hoodie
description: White hoodie featuring the Ankh symbol of life on the chest and geometric Sphinx face artwork on the back. Symbol of eternal life and mystery.

name: Shift Oversized Hoodie
description: Our signature oversized hoodie with embroidered SHAPESHIFTERS logo. Heavy-weight cotton blend for that premium streetwear feel.

name: Transform Graphic Tee
description: Bold graphic tee featuring our "Shift Your Reality" artwork. Relaxed fit in premium organic cotton.

name: Reality Cargo Pants
description: Utility-inspired cargo pants with multiple pockets. Tapered fit with adjustable hem.

name: Evolve Crewneck
description: Premium crewneck with embroidered details. Dropped shoulders for that effortless street look.

name: Phase Shorts
description: Athletic shorts with drawstring waist. Perfect for summer street style.

name: Shift Cap
description: Structured baseball cap with embroidered logo. Adjustable strap for perfect fit.

name: Core Sock Pack
description: Pack of 3 premium crew socks with minimal stripe detail. Cushioned sole for comfort.
